> **Note:** This will be reviewed by a maintainer and added via the admin panel — not directly merged as code. Thanks for helping grow the map!

## Spot name

<!-- e.g. "USJ-R Engineering Corridor 3F" -->

## Location

- **Building / landmark:** <!-- e.g. Engineering Building, near Gate 2 -->
- **Floor / area:** <!-- e.g. 3rd floor, left wing -->
- **On campus?** <!-- Yes / No -->
- **Walking time from campus gate (if off-campus):** <!-- e.g. ~5 min -->

## Rough capacity

<!-- How many people can comfortably study here? -->
- [ ] Small (~8 people)
- [ ] Medium (~20 people)
- [ ] Large (~40 people)

## Amenities

- [ ] Power outlets available
- [ ] Wi-Fi available
- [ ] Generally quiet
- [ ] Food/drinks nearby

## Why it's a good study spot

<!-- What makes this spot worth adding? Open hours, seating comfort, lighting, etc. -->

## Photo (optional)

<!-- Drag and drop a photo here if you have one. -->
